name: PPG INDUSTRIES INC
business: PPG Industries, Inc. manufactures and distributes a broad range of paints, coatings and specialty products. PPG supplies paints, coatings and specialty products to customers serving industrial equipment, packaging, aircraft, marine, automotive original equipment, automotive refinish, pavement marking, and commercial and residential construction markets.
sellsTo: commercial and residential new build and maintenance customers

exposures.sentence: Aerospace coatings: Coatings, sealants, transparencies, adhesives, engineered materials, packaging and chemical management services for the aerospace industry.
We believe the automotive industry will experience significant and continued change in the coming years, including an increase in the production of electric vehicles.
PPG Industries, Inc. manufactures and distributes a broad range of paints, coatings and specialty products.
The security of our information technology systems could be compromised which could adversely affect our operations or reputation.
PPG supplies paints, coatings and specialty products to customers serving a wide array of end-uses, including aircraft and marine equipment.
Industrial Coatings: ... building products (including residential and commercial construction).

Architectural coatings Latin America and Asia Pacific: Paints, wood stains, adhesives, sealants and purchased sundries Painting and maintenance contractors and consumers for decoration and maintenance of residential and commercial building structures.
We are incorporating artificial intelligence technologies into our research, products, services and processes.

catalysts.sentence: The Company raised its per-share quarterly dividend by approximately 5% to $0.71 per share in July 2025.

catalysts.event: Term Loan amendment extending maturity to 2029
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the Term Loan was amended to extend its maturity to January 2029.

catalysts.event: Restructuring incremental savings target of $50 million in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Total restructuring savings were approximately $75 million in 2025 and the Company expects approximately $50 million in incremental savings in 2026.
During 2026, capital expenditures, which are expected to be approximately $650 million to $700 million, will support future organic growth opportunities.
